'''T-3PO''' was a blue-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] who served on [[Trevura]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. T-3PO served under [[S-R6]], an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] who moved about [[Voma]], a [[City/Legends|city]] on Trevura, in order to buy illegal and experimental versions of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] that were imported by [[Merno Blask]], the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of Voma.

It was later discovered that T-3PO was reprogrammed to be able to fire a blaster, making T-3PO able to handle itself in a battle.
